properties.name: Ashton et al. 2015 example path (Inmarsat)
properties.label: Ashton et al. 2015 example path (Inmarsat) · RECONSTRUCTION
properties.desc: Published candidate route for the SATCOM-only final hours (02:22-08:19 UTC+8), 10 path points ending at or near the 7th arc. A model claimed consistent with the satellite data by its authors, not a recorded track.

citation.label: Ashton et al. (2015), 'The Search for MH370', Journal of Navigation 68(1), Table 9 'Example Reconstructed Flight Path Results', p.20; route description section 6.3, p.21

properties.name: UGIB 2020 (Ulich, Godfrey, Iannello, Banks)
properties.label: UGIB 2020 (Ulich, Godfrey, Iannello, Banks) · RECONSTRUCTION
properties.desc: Published candidate route for the SATCOM-only final hours (02:22-08:19 UTC+8), 19 path points ending at or near the 7th arc. A model claimed consistent with the satellite data by its authors, not a recorded track.

citation.label: Ulich, Godfrey, Iannello, Banks (7 March 2020), 'The Final Resting Place of MH370', Figs 3-4 (pp.4-5), section 5.2 (p.18), Appendix E 'FMT Route' (pp.127-137)

properties.name: WSPR/GDTAAA 2023 (Godfrey, Coetzee, Maskell) - contested
properties.label: WSPR/GDTAAA 2023 (Godfrey, Coetzee, Maskell) - contested · RECONSTRUCTION
properties.desc: Published candidate route for the SATCOM-only final hours (02:22-08:19 UTC+8), 65 path points ending at or near the 7th arc. A model claimed consistent with the satellite data by its authors, not a recorded track.

citation.label: Godfrey, Coetzee, Maskell (31 Aug 2023), 'MH370 Flight Path Analysis - Case Study', Table 5 pp.50-53; prime crash location p.5/p.49. Methodology contested (not peer-reviewed; rejected by Iannello, Steel and others)

properties.name: CAPTIO 2022 (Blelly & Marchand) piloted ditching
properties.label: CAPTIO 2022 (Blelly & Marchand) piloted ditching · RECONSTRUCTION
properties.desc: Published candidate route for the SATCOM-only final hours (02:22-08:19 UTC+8), 12 path points ending at or near the 7th arc. A model claimed consistent with the satellite data by its authors, not a recorded track.

citation.label: Blelly & Marchand (CAPTIO v4a, May/June 2022), 'Analysis of Flight MH370 - From waypoint VAMPI until the estimated touch down', Tables 4, 9, 10; Executive Summary p.1
